brand_identity.name: P-Nice
brand_identity.positioning: Collagen for the polished daily routine
brand_identity.target_audience: Wellness-conscious women (25-45) who value aesthetics and routine

headings.usage: All section titles, hero text, and product names. Use tight tracking.

body.usage: Product descriptions, UI elements, navigation, buttons

layout_strategy.grid_system: Use 'Bento Mode A' for lifestyle sections, 'Simple Grid' for products

dawn_specifics.product_cards: No shadow by default, 1px border border-stone-200, minimalist layout. Image takes 70% of card height.
dawn_specifics.hero: Split screen (Text Left, Image Right) OR Full width banner with centered text overlay. For P-Nice, use Split Screen for trust.
dawn_specifics.buttons: Sharp corners or rounded-sm (2px). Uppercase text tracking-widest text-xs or sm.

buttons.primary: rounded-none px-8 py-4 bg-primary text-primary-foreground uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity
buttons.secondary: rounded-none px-8 py-4 border border-primary text-primary bg-transparent uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold hover:bg-primary hover:text-white transition-colors

cards.product: group relative flex flex-col bg-white border border-stone-100 hover:border-stone-300 transition-colors
cards.image_behavior: object-cover w-full h-full group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-700 ease-out

navigation.style: Sticky, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80), 1px bottom border border-stone-100
navigation.links: text-sm uppercase tracking-widest font-medium hover:text-stone-500 transition-colors

visual_enhancers.shadows: Very subtle ambient shadows only for floating elements (Cart, Popups). shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]
visual_enhancers.borders: Delicate 1px borders in #E6E6E6. Use dividing lines between grid items (Dawn style).

micro_interactions.hover: Images zoom slightly (scale-105). Buttons invert colors.

instructions_to_main_agent: Update 'tailwind.config.js' with the new color palette (Warm Ivory background).
Use 'Playfair Display' for all Headings (H1-H4) and 'DM Sans' for Body text. Import them via Google Fonts.
Create a 'Section' component that handles the max-width and standard padding (py-24).
For the 'Trust Bar', use a marquee or a simple flex row with icons and uppercase text.
The Product Page must have a 'Sticky' details section on the right while images scroll on the left (classic Shopify Dawn layout).
Cart must be a 'Slide-over' drawer from the right, not a separate page.
Use 'framer-motion' for simple fade-ins on scroll. No complex 3D.
Implement the 'Shop by Ritual' as a 3-column grid with text overlay on images.
universal_guidelines: Do not use rounded corners larger than 'rounded-sm' (4px) or 'rounded-md' (6px). Keep it sharp.
